_publications._publicationTitle: p21-Activated kinases are required for transformation in a cell-based model of neurofibromatosis type 2.

_contextSnippet: the invasiveness of ΔBB cells was almost twice that of control NIH-3T3 cells
details: ΔBB cells showed almost twice the invasiveness of control NIH-3T3 cells in Matrigel invasion assay
